description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a compact, robust design, featuring a matte black finish and a prominent, adjustable stock. The receiver is boxy and angular, with a visible magazine well below, and a detachable box magazine placed in front of the trigger guard. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and appears to have a pump-action mechanism, with a short, thick barrel extending from the front. The stock is a full, solid type with a slight ergonomic curve for shoulder support, and the pistol grip is integrated for enhanced handling. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the overall build suggests a modern, urban tactical application. The shotgun's exterior is primarily metal with some polymer components, and the design emphasizes durability and ease of use in high-stress environments.
description: A compact, tactical black shotgun with a full stock, ribbed pump fore-end, and detachable box magazine, designed for urban use. Its robust build and ergonomic features suggest modern, high-durability construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short, thick barrel and ribbed pump fore-end, with the magazine barely visible below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the adjustable stock, pistol grip, ribbed pump, and the detachable box magazine placed below the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's ergonomic curve and the alignment of the receiver and barrel, with the magazine visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump, magazine, and stock from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with ribbed fore-end and no visible venting or ribbing on the barrel itself
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with ample space and smooth edges, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
